channel.title: Installation on Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Installation on Docs

item.title: UUV Simulator
item.description: 0. 依赖 UUV Simulator安装依赖ROS和catkin工具 (1) ROS Ubuntu18.04对应ROS Melodic melodic/Installation/Ubuntu - ROS Wiki (2) catkin_tools sudo apt-get install python3-catkin-tools 1. 安装 源码安装基于 ROS Melodic 和 Gazebo9 的 uuv-simulator. (1) 创建ROS工作空间 mkdir -p ~/catkin_ws/src cd ~/catkin_ws/src (2) 初始化catkin工作空间 cd ~/catkin_ws catkin init (3) clone源码 cd ~/catkin_ws/src git clone https://github.com/uuvsimulator/uuv_simulator.git # clone 失败，使用国内 gitee 地址 # git clone https://gitee.com/h_wanng/uuv_simulator.git (4) 安装 cd ~/catkin_ws rosdep install --from-paths src --ignore-src --rosdistro=melodic -y -- skip-keys "gazebo gazebo_msgs gazebo_plugins gazebo_ros gazebo_ros_control gazebo_ros_pkgs" (5) 编译 cd ~/catkin_ws catkin_make install Note: 编译报错多重试几次，大多和内存相关

item.title: ROS Melodic Installation
item.description: ROS Wiki ROS Melodic Installation 较简单，按官方文档进行安装。 Note 选择国内镜像源进行配置安装 安装完成在终端执行roscore测试安装情况 ROS Melodic Ubuntu (Melodic对应Ubuntu18) 选择配置国内(China)镜像源安装 roscore命令测试安装成功
